upstream_interfaces.TASK-004: make warehouse-dump 已实跑生成 data/qlib_warehouse.db（20505 ohlcv 行 / 15 symbol）。build_warehouse.main(argv)->int。

TASK-008_qlib.behavior: Name()=='qlib'; 日线走仓库+补尾; 非日线/quote 委托 external; 无仓库数据返回 error

TASK-009_selector.SelectExternalForSymbol: func SelectExternalForSymbol(reg *collector.Registry, symbol string) collector.Collector — 永不返回 qlib(GetAll 兜底跳过)
TASK-009_selector.usage: WithExternal(func(s string) collector.Collector { return collector.SelectExternalForSymbol(appReg, s) })

upstream_interfaces.TASK-010_config: config.Config.Qlib QlibConfig{Enabled bool; DBPath string; MaxStalenessDays int}
upstream_interfaces.TASK-011_app: func (a *App) CollectorRegistry() *collector.Registry — 返回 live registry 供 SelectExternalForSymbol 运行时查找

core_types.OHLCV: core.OHLCV{Symbol string; Interval string; Open/High/Low/Close float64; Volume int64; Time time.Time}

env.sqlite_driver: modernc.org/sqlite v1.38.2（go1.24 兼容，Leader 预置；go get 用 GOTOOLCHAIN=local）
